scripts.compile-examples: pnpm run clean:examples && tsp compile examples/ --config tspconfig.yaml && pnpm run format-examples
scripts.compile-examples:gorm: rm -rf outputs/gorm && tsp compile examples/ --config tspconfig.yaml --emit @qninhdt/typespec-gorm && pnpm run format-examples:gorm
scripts.compile-examples:sqlmodel: rm -rf outputs/sqlmodel && tsp compile examples/ --config tspconfig.yaml --emit @qninhdt/typespec-sqlmodel && pnpm run format-examples:sqlmodel
scripts.compile-examples:zod: rm -rf outputs/zod && tsp compile examples/ --config tspconfig.yaml --emit @qninhdt/typespec-zod && pnpm run format-examples:zod
scripts.compile-examples:dbml: rm -rf outputs/dbml && tsp compile examples/ --config tspconfig.yaml --emit @qninhdt/typespec-dbml
scripts.format-examples: pnpm run format-examples:gorm && pnpm run format-examples:sqlmodel && pnpm run format-examples:zod
